summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Daily Operations system with 3 tabs (Sales Log, Daily Profit, Close Accounts). All backend APIs working perfectly, frontend UI functional with proper tab navigation and data integration. Sales log auto-populated when invoices created.
passed_tests: Login with admin/admin123 credentials
Daily Operations page loads at /daily-ops with correct title and description
All 3 tabs present and clickable: Sales Log, Daily Profit, Close Accounts
Date picker functional with current date pre-selected
Sales Log table shows correct columns: #, Time, Product, Customer, Invoice, Qty, Price, Discount, Total, Running
Daily Profit tab displays Revenue, COGS, Gross Profit, Expenses, Net Profit sections
Sales by Category section visible in Daily Profit
Expense management buttons (Expense, Advance, Farm) functional
Close Accounts tab shows cash counting form and allocation fields
Expected Cash calculation working correctly
GET /api/daily-log returns sequential entries with correct structure
GET /api/daily-report returns profit report with all required fields
GET /api/daily-close returns closing status information
GET /api/employees CRUD operations working
POST /api/employees creates new employee successfully
POST /api/expenses/farm creates expense AND receivable
POST /api/expenses/employee-advance records advance correctly
POST /api/daily-close creates closing report with extra cash calculation
Invoice creation through /api/invoices populates sales log entries automatically
Sales log shows sequential numbering and running totals correctly
Daily report updates with revenue, expenses, and profit calculations after transactions
Branch ID integration working correctly between frontend and backend
